text.title: Structured Logging as Code Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable input signals onto a conclusion that references a rule id from 01-core-rules.xml.

decision-tree.root-question: Are preconditions satisfied: non-dev environment, aggregated logs, controllable shape, PII surface present?

conclusion.verdict: missing preconditions; CLI-only or no-PII service; delay or use minimal logger

branch.question: Are logs emitted as JSON with the required fields?

conclusion.verdict: switch to structured JSON logger; populate required fields

branch.question: Are PII fields routed through a redaction layer?

conclusion.verdict: wire redaction layer; codify rules; cover exception path

branch.question: Do request-scoped logs carry trace_id and span_id?

conclusion.verdict: inject OTel context into log adapter; propagate into workers
ship CI fixture that asserts schema + redaction + trace

text.example: Worked path from root-question to conclusion.
